examples: "I shall vote first," DE Roquefort said.
“Plotting, Seneschal?” de Roquefort asked, the eyes beaming.
The younger man had stood silent as he and DE Roquefort sparred.
The bacteria involved in making kimchee are not the same as those used to make Roquefort.
The costermongers are long gone, but the cheesemongers have dug in with their Reblochon and their Roquefort.
